text:
Jeitsari (ジェイトサリ, Jeitosari) is a professional Hunter and a former Greed Island player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Appearance

Jeitsari is a male of average height who has a full beard, fair hair, and wears a type of collared clothing During the first round of the 13th Hunter Chairman Election, he also wears sunglasses. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 320 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Jeitsari owned seven copies of the Greed Island game that held a total value of 5.8 billion . He left a contract with his lawyer which stated that if no one had completed the game by January 1 st 2000, he would entrust all of his copies and consoles to the Southernpiece Auction.

13 th  Hunter Chairman Election arc

After the death of Chairman Netero, Jeitsari appears in person at the Hunter Association headquarters to partake in the first round of the 13th Hunter Chairman Election. 

Abilities & Powers

Jeitsari has all the benefits granted by his status as a Hunter. 

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Jeitsari is capable of utilizing Nen. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

According to Jeitsari's will, his Greed Island cartridge along with six others was donated to the Southernpiece Auction on January 1 st , 2000, suggesting that this is the year the 287th Hunter Exam took place. This appears to have been retconned, since Killua left the game to attend the 288th Hunter Exam on December 29 th , 1999. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 146
